query: soft focus dreamy hazy out of focus portrait
message: sub:intentional_blur/soft_focus — anti_aesthetic — dreamy hazy out-of-focus portraits, vaseline lens, soft veil

response.objective_caption: A woman in a bright pink top seated next to a man wearing a white shirt, captured in soft focus with greenery visible in the background. The woman wears hoop earrings and has light brown hair. A translucent overlay of her face appears shifted and ghosted across the frame, creating a layered portrait effect.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A woman in a bright pink top seated next to a man wearing a white shirt, captured with deliberate motion blur and soft focus that smears features into ethereal streaks. Her face is overlaid with a translucent, shifted ghost of itself, creating a dreamlike double exposure effect where identities dissolve into flowing pink and cream tones, with background foliage reduced to abstract green washes.
